Clear the in-session digitraffic cache

Source: R/cache.R
dt_cache_clear.Rd

Station metadata (dt_stations()) and sensor metadata (dt_sensors()) are cached for 5 minutes within an R session to avoid redundant API calls. Call this function to force the next call to either function to fetch fresh data from the API.

Usage

dt_cache_clear()

Value

Invisibly returns NULL.

Examples

dt_cache_clear()
#> digitraffic cache cleared.
